caption: A person wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap is seen in a small inset window, sitting at a desk with equipment, while the main view focuses on several boxes of trading cards. The boxes are stacked and feature the brand "Clearly Authentic." A white table surface is decorated with the "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" logo, accompanied by the text "Sports Cards & Collectibles" and "HERMOSA BEACH." A small red and white football-shaped object and a red six-sided die are placed on the table. A prominent orange and white banner at the bottom of the screen reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" and provides the website "JASPYSCASEBREAKS.COM." As the sequence progresses, the person in the inset window remains relatively still, while the main shot stays focused on the boxes and promotional branding, with no significant movements or changes in the arrangement of the objects.
